Notice And Motion To Compel Responses Of Pltf To Form Interrogatories, Set One And For Monetary Sanctions
Off Calendar Sep-13-2007 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
NO APPEARANCE. TENTATIVE RULING ADOPTED. Defendant Daimlerchrysler Financial Services' motion to compel responses to form interrogatories is Granted.
No opposition has been filed. Plaintiff is ordered to serve complete verified responses without objections within 15 days of notice of this order. Monetary sanctions in the amount of $225 are to be paid within 30 days of notice of this order. Prevailing party to submit form of order. COMMISSIONER: BRUCE E. CHAN.

Notice And Motion To Compel Responses Of Pltf To Specially Prepared Interrogatories, Set One And For Monetary Sanctions
Off Calendar Sep-13-2007 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
NO APPEARANCE. TENTATIVE RULING ADOPTED. Defendant Daimlerchysler Financial Services' motion to compel responses to special interrogatories is Granted. No opposition has been filed. Plaintiff is ordered to serve complete verified responses without objections within 15 days of notice of this order. Monetary sanctions in the amount of $225 are to be paid within 30 days of notice of this order. Prevailing party to submit form of order. COMMISSIONER: BRUCE E. CHAN.

Notice And Motion To Compel Resposes Of Pltf To Request For Production Of Documents, Set One And For Monetary Sanctions
Off Calendar Sep-13-2007 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
NO APPEARANCE. TENTATIVE RULING ADOPTED. Defendant Daimlercrysler Financial Services' motion to compel responses to request for production of documents
Granted. No opposition has been filed. Plaintiff is ordered to serve complete verified responses without objections and documents within 15 days of notice of this order. Monetary sanctions in the amount of $225 are to be paid within 30 days of notice of this order. Prevailing party to submit form of order. COMMISSIONER: BRUCE E. CHAN.
